notes: Living room should be close to main entrance.
For Indian homes, living room often connects to dining or lobby.
Avoid making living room a passage-only dead space.
Dining should be near kitchen.
Dining can be combined with living in compact homes.
Kitchen should have ventilation/window.
Utility or wash area is preferred near kitchen.
Avoid placing kitchen in the exact center of the house.
Master bedroom should be more private than living room.
Attached toilet is preferred for master bedroom.
Wardrobe wall should be planned without blocking windows.
Bedroom should not open directly into kitchen.
Provide at least one window for light and ventilation.
Toilet should align with plumbing shaft where possible.
Common toilet should be accessible from living/dining/lobby.
Attached toilet should be accessible only from bedroom.
Staircase should be easy to access from entrance/lobby.
For rental/future floor use, external or semi-external stair is preferred.
Avoid staircase blocking main natural light.
Parking is usually planned at front side if road is at front.
Parking should not block main entry completely.
For 30x50 plot, one car parking plus entry lobby is usually possible.
Balcony should face road, garden, or open side where possible.
Avoid balcony without useful access.
Pooja can be near living/dining but should not be inside toilet/kitchen wall conflict.
Northeast is commonly preferred when possible.
